description: Horizontal flex row. Arranges children side-by-side with control over gap, alignment and justification. For icon+text pairs, header bars, toolbars, and inline groups.

data-flex.agent_hint: Activates horizontal flex row. No value needed — bare attribute.

data-align.agent_hint: Aligns children on the cross (vertical) axis.

data-justify.agent_hint: Justifies children on the main (horizontal) axis.

data-wrap.agent_hint: Controls whether items wrap to next line.

item.agent_hint: Inline children placed side by side in the flex row.

data-grow.agent_hint: Makes the child expand to fill remaining space.

do: Use for icon+text pairs, header bars, toolbars
Use data-justify=between for left/right split layouts
Use data-grow on the element that should fill remaining space
Use data-align=center to vertically center inline items
dont: Do not use for multi-row grid layouts — use data-grid instead
Do not use inline styles for alignment
